center.name: 拟黄鹂属
center.summary: 拟黄鹂属是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Yellow-tailed oriole、Scott's oriole，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Scott's oriole (Icterus parisorum) is a medium-sized icterid (the same family as many blackbirds, meadowlarks, cowbirds, grackles, and others, including the New World orioles)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This large oriole inhabits dense thickets, often with vines, Heliconias and similar dense growths, in swampy lowlands

links.evidence: The Scott's oriole (Icterus parisorum) is a medium-sized icterid (the same family as many blackbirds, meadowlarks, cowbirds, grackles, and others, including the New World orioles)
